entries.name: Radiant Glory
entries.definition: Pure divine light with no shadow

entries.name: Light Veil
entries.definition: Soft luminous presence with translucent shadows

entries.name: Shadow Dance

entries.name: Inner Glow
entries.definition: Deep inner radiance with solid outer shadow

entries.name: Divine Eclipse
